home.tagline: Identify, research, and value any golf ball ever made.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search Pro V1, Chrome Soft, TP5…

search.title: Browse Golf Balls
search.resultsFor: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for “{query}”
search.noResultsHint: Try a different spelling or browse by segment.
search.noFilterResults: No balls found with these filters.

ballDNA.title: Ball DNA
ballDNA.subtitle: Performance trait profile
ballDNA.noData: Technical specifications required for DNA analysis.

explanations.insufficient: Insufficient visual feature data for reliable identification.

valuation.title: Market Value
valuation.noDataDescription: Market data for this ball hasn't been collected yet. Valuations are based on observed sale prices — missing values are left empty rather than estimated.
valuation.observations: {count, plural, one {# market observation} other {# market observations}}

specGrid.noSpecs: Specifications not yet available for this version.

visualId.noData: Visual identification data not yet available.

brands.title: Brands
brands.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# manufacturer} other {# manufacturers}} in the registry
brands.empty: No brands in the registry yet.

brandDetail.empty: No ball families catalogued for this brand yet.

compare.title: Compare
compare.subtitle: Side-by-side specifications for up to 4 golf balls.
compare.emptySearch: Search for a golf ball above to start comparing.
compare.emptyAddMore: Add at least one more ball to compare.
compare.searchPlaceholder: Search for a ball to compare…

identify.title: Identify a Golf Ball
identify.description: Enter what you can observe about the ball. The more features you provide, the more precise the result.

steps.step1: Enter the brand name printed on the ball
steps.step2: Add the model text, e.g. “Pro V1” or “Chrome Soft”
steps.step3: Note any alignment markings, number color, or special patterns
steps.step4: Submit to see ranked candidates with confidence scores

form.logoTextHint: Text printed on the ball, e.g. Pro V1, Chrome Soft
form.alignmentMarkingHint: e.g. Triple Track, single line, arrow, none
form.logoStyleHint: Visual style of the brand logo, e.g. Titleist script
form.visualPatternHint: Any distinctive surface pattern, e.g. Truvis, hexagonal, camo

results.candidates: {count, plural, one {# candidate} other {# candidates}} found
results.noResults: No candidates matched the provided features.
results.noResultsHint: Try fewer or different features — brand and logo text give the strongest signal.
results.closeMatchDescription: The top results are difficult to distinguish with the provided features. Adding alignment markings, number color, or logo style will narrow the result.

feedback.reportIssue: Report an issue with this ball
feedback.thanks: Thanks — your feedback has been submitted and will be reviewed.

notFound.title: Ball not found
notFound.description: This ball may not be in the registry yet.

home.title: BallAtlas — Golf Ball Intelligence
home.description: The most comprehensive golf ball registry, identification platform, and intelligence database.

compare.title: Compare Golf Balls
compare.description: Compare golf ball specifications side-by-side. Up to 4 balls at once.

identify.title: Identify a Golf Ball
identify.description: Enter observable features to identify any golf ball in the BallAtlas registry.
